briefdescription.para: Finds the path to the gpgconf executable in the same directory as the given GPG path.
QString result = findGpgconfInGpgDir(gpgPath); std::cout << result.toStdString() << std::endl; // Expected output: path to gpgconf or empty string.

detaileddescription.para: Finds the path to the gpgconf executable in the same directory as the given GPG path.
